title: COVID-19 Pandemic: The Impact of the Virus on India’s GDP

summary.about: The early economic shock of COVID-19 across Indian finance, tourism, aviation, manufacturing and consumer sectors.
summary.audience: Indian business leaders, investors and economic policymakers.
summary.method: Synthesizes early market, trade, sector and public-health data in a rapid economic assessment.
summary.insights: Travel and hospitality faced the deepest immediate losses, while supply-chain disruption spread damage into automobiles and consumer goods.
